learning_items.rule: Select the fixed-horizon estimand before interpreting event fractions; separate censoring-aware observed risk and prediction error from recorded deaths.
Keep discrimination, calibration, score-range compression, transport causation, and clinical utility as separate evidence-bound claim families.
Generate tables and figures from one structured evidence source and bind source, request, renderer, and output fingerprints.
Construct non-isomorphism or missing identity linkage terminates comparative attribution estimation instead of triggering proxy substitution.
Freeze an immutable reviewer snapshot after candidate build and before independent review; reviewers consume only declared members.
Analyze plausibility anomalies as non-mutating sensitivity evidence while preserving frozen source values.
Every numeric verification claim declares evidence class, included and excluded quantities, replicate provenance, and independent-rerun status.
Development-performance and target-population qualifiers follow every corresponding number or conclusion across all human and machine surfaces.
